# Imported RAR Fixture Provenance

All `*.rar.uu` files from libarchive were decoded to real binary fixtures before vendoring into Weaver.

| Local fixture | Upstream file | URL |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `rar4/ssokolow_rar3_authenticity_verification.rar` | `build/testfile.rar3.av.rar` | `https://github.com/ssokolow/rar-test-files/blob/master/build/testfile.rar3.av.rar` |
